case_title: MARIBEL RODRIGUEZ ET AL VS. CONNIE MAN LAI WONG ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. 506 PLAINTIFF'S MARIBEL RODRIGUEZ AND VIRGIL EMPERADOR ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S CONNIE WONG AND ERIC MCFAUL-WONG ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARIBEL EMPERADOR, VIRGIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, CONNIE MAN LAI WONG-MCFAUL, ERIC $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
